title: Trade Journal Payload Examples
description: Comprehensive examples for TradeJournalController API requests with enhanced attachment support

examples.name: minimal_journal_entry
examples.description: Minimal required fields for creating a journal entry

payload.title: Quick Trade Note
payload.content: Simple observation about market conditions today.

examples.name: basic_trade_journal
examples.description: Basic journal entry with common fields

payload.title: Nifty 50 Scalp Trade
payload.content: Executed quick scalp on Nifty based on 5-minute breakout. Entry was clean at support level.

examples.name: journal_with_legacy_images
examples.description: Journal entry using legacy imageUrls (backward compatible)

payload.title: Bank Nifty Options Trade
payload.content: Executed call option on Bank Nifty. Chart showed bullish engulfing pattern.

examples.name: journal_with_attachments
examples.description: Modern journal entry using structured attachments with metadata

payload.title: Comprehensive Analysis - Reliance Industries
payload.content: Detailed technical and fundamental analysis of Reliance Industries position trade. Entry based on multiple timeframe confirmation.

attachments.description: Daily chart showing support and resistance levels
Detailed trade plan with entry, exit, and risk management

examples.name: journal_with_categorized_urls
examples.description: Journal entry with categorized URL fields for better organization

payload.title: HDFC Bank Swing Trade Setup
payload.content: Setting up swing trade on HDFC Bank based on weekly chart pattern. Multiple confirmations from volume and RSI.

examples.name: comprehensive_journal_entry
examples.description: Complete journal entry with all available fields including attachments and categorized URLs

payload.title: Major Position Trade - TCS Weekly Options Strategy
payload.content: Comprehensive weekly options strategy on TCS. Implemented iron condor based on earnings expectations and volatility analysis. Entry executed with precise risk management parameters. Position sizing calculated based on portfolio allocation rules.

attachments.description: Option chain snapshot showing strike selection
Comprehensive risk management and exit strategy

examples.name: general_market_journal
examples.description: General journal entry without specific trade (market observation)

payload.title: Market Observation - High Volatility Day
payload.content: Observed unusual volatility across the board. Bank Nifty showing strong bearish pressure while IT stocks holding support. VIX spiked to 18.5. Decision made to stay on sidelines until clearer direction emerges.

examples.name: psychology_focused_journal
examples.description: Journal entry focused on trading psychology and emotions

payload.title: Lesson Learned - Overtrading Due to FOMO
payload.content: Made the mistake of entering a trade based on FOMO after seeing strong moves in the market. Violated my trading plan by not waiting for proper setup. Position immediately went against me. Closed with small loss but important lesson learned about discipline and patience.

action_items: Review trading plan before every entry
Set alerts instead of watching charts constantly

examples.name: update_journal_entry
examples.description: Example of updating an existing journal entry with additional insights

payload.title: Nifty 50 Scalp Trade - Updated with Exit Analysis
payload.content: Executed quick scalp on Nifty based on 5-minute breakout. Entry was clean at support level. UPDATE: Exited with 1.2% profit after hitting first target. Price continued higher but followed plan to take profits at predetermined level. Discipline maintained.

attachments.description: Chart showing exit point and subsequent price action
